route_summary: Your 30-minute variety-packed tour (free-spirited style) visits 6 key galleries across 18 rooms. We focused on sculpture from Southeast Asian, Himalayan. You're looking for something powerful, mysterious, surprising — we kept that in mind.

route.name: Chinese Ceramics & More!
route.reason: You'll pass through here on your way — keep an eye out.

featured_artworks.title: Vase
featured_artworks.alt_text: Slender porcelain vase with a white rim, three neck rings, and mottled reddish-pink glaze
featured_artworks.reason: Picked because it's a museum highlight.

route.name: Gallery 202
route.reason: You'll pass through here on your way — keep an eye out.

featured_artworks.title: Jar with dragon
featured_artworks.medium: Porcelain painted with cobalt blue under transparent glaze (Jingdezhen ware)
featured_artworks.alt_text: Porcelain jar decorated with a blue underglaze dragon among clouds and a band of lotus petals
featured_artworks.reason: Picked because it's a museum highlight.

route.name: Chinese Art: Ancient to Tang Dynasty
route.reason: A great stop that complements your interests.

featured_artworks.title: Pole Base in the Form of a Tiger
featured_artworks.alt_text: Dark greenish-brown stone sculpture of a stylized reclining animal with a circular hole in its back
featured_artworks.reason: Picked because you said you love sculpture.

featured_artworks.title: Figure of a charioteer
featured_artworks.alt_text: Bronze figure of a person with hands outstretched in a gripping gesture wearing a patterned tunic
featured_artworks.reason: Same sculpture you love, but from Chinese — a fresh perspective.

featured_artworks.title: Guardian Lion
featured_artworks.alt_text: Limestone sculpture of a crouching feline-like creature with bulging eyes and wide, toothy mouth
featured_artworks.reason: A hidden gem — let yourself be surprised.

route.name: Chinese Buddhist Art
route.reason: You'll pass through here on your way — keep an eye out.

featured_artworks.title: Buddha Maitreya (Mile)
featured_artworks.medium: Gilt bronze with traces of pigment; piece-mold cast
featured_artworks.alt_text: Gilt bronze standing figure on a petal-decorated base with raised right hand and serene expression
featured_artworks.reason: Picked because you said you love sculpture and it's a museum highlight.

route.name: Flip Sides: Seeing Korean Art Anew
route.reason: A great stop that complements your interests.

featured_artworks.title: Rafter finial in the shape of a dragon’s head and wind chime
featured_artworks.alt_text: Gilt bronze rafter finial shaped like a horned creature with bulging eyes and an open mouth
featured_artworks.reason: Picked because you said you love sculpture and it's a museum highlight.

featured_artworks.title: Seated bodhisattva (left attendant of a triad)
featured_artworks.alt_text: Gilded wood sculpture of a person seated cross-legged wearing an elaborate crown with bird motifs
featured_artworks.reason: Same sculpture you love, but from Korean — a fresh perspective.

featured_artworks.title: Bird-shaped vessel
featured_artworks.alt_text: Bird-shaped earthenware vessel with a tall crest, long neck, and two circular openings on its back
featured_artworks.reason: A museum highlight you'll pass right by — worth a look.
